name: ecomate
description: EcoMate E-Commerce Platform - Full Stack Deployment
note: Deploy via Portainer UI. Fill in all required fields before deploying.

env.name: CORS_ORIGIN
env.label: CORS Origins (auto-set from CLIENT_DOMAIN if left empty)

env.name: APP_URL
env.label: App URL (auto-set from CLIENT_DOMAIN if left empty)

env.name: STOREFRONT_URL
env.label: Storefront URL (auto-set from CLIENT_DOMAIN if left empty)

env.name: STORE_NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
env.label: Storefront API URL (auto-set from CLIENT_DOMAIN if left empty)

env.name: STORE_NEXT_PUBLIC_STOREFRONT_URL
env.label: Storefront Public URL (auto-set from CLIENT_DOMAIN if left empty)

env.name: SEED_DUMMY_DATA
env.label: Seed Dummy Data on first deploy? (true/false)
